name: playwright
description: Browser automation for E2E testing — controls Playwright/Chromium via a persistent HTTP bridge daemon

args.name: headless
args.description: Run browser in headless mode. Set to false to see the browser UI during development.

args.name: unsafe-local
args.description: Run Playwright on the host machine instead of inside Docker.

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a URL and wait for the page to load. Use this to start a new page or navigate between pages.

tools.name: browser_navigate_back
tools.description: Go back to the previous page in browser history

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Perform a click on a web page element identified by a CSS selector or accessibility reference

target.description: CSS selector or element reference from the page snapshot

element.description: Human-readable description of the element to click

doubleClick.description: Whether to double-click instead of single click

modifiers.description: Modifier keys to press during click

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an editable element (input, textarea, contenteditable)

target.description: CSS selector for the input element

text.description: Text to type into the element

submit.description: Whether to press Enter after typing

slowly.description: Type one character at a time with delay

tools.name: browser_hover
tools.description: Hover the mouse over an element on the page

target.description: CSS selector for the element to hover

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key (e.g. ArrowLeft, Enter, Escape, Tab)

key.description: Key name (ArrowLeft, Enter, Escape, Tab, Backspace, Delete, etc.) or character to generate

tools.name: browser_select_option
tools.description: Select an option in a dropdown/select element

target.description: CSS selector for the select element

tools.name: browser_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields at once. Each field specifies a target, type, and value.

tools.name: browser_handle_dialog
tools.description: Accept or dismiss a browser dialog (alert, confirm, prompt)

promptText.description: Text to enter for prompt dialogs

tools.name: browser_drag
tools.description: Perform a drag and drop operation between two elements

startTarget.description: CSS selector for the element to drag

endTarget.description: CSS selector for the drop target element

tools.name: browser_drop
tools.description: Drop files or MIME-typed data onto an element as if dragged from outside the page. Provide paths (absolute file paths) or data (MIME type map).

target.description: CSS selector for the drop target element

paths.description: Absolute paths to files to drop

data.description: Data to drop as MIME type map (e.g. {"text/plain": "hello"})

tools.name: browser_file_upload
tools.description: Upload one or multiple files via a file input element

paths.description: Absolute paths to files to upload. If omitted, file chooser is cancelled.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Capture the accessibility snapshot of the current page. This shows the interactive element tree with roles, names, values, and states. Use this instead of screenshots for understanding what's on the page.

target.description: CSS selector to scope the snapshot to a specific element

depth.description: Limit the depth of the snapshot tree

tools.name: browser_take_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element. Use browser_snapshot instead for understanding page content — screenshots are visual only.

target.description: CSS selector for a specific element to screenshot

filename.description: File name to save the screenshot to

tools.name: browser_console_messages
tools.description: Returns all console messages (log, warn, error, debug) from the page since the last call or since page load

all.description: Return all messages since page load, not just since last call

tools.name: browser_network_requests
tools.description: Returns a numbered list of network requests made by the page. Use the index with browser_network_request to get full details.

static.description: Include successful static resources (images, fonts, etc.)

filename.description: Filename to save the list to

tools.name: browser_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for a condition: time to pass, text to appear, or text to disappear from the page

text.description: Text to wait for to appear on the page

textGone.description: Text to wait for to disappear from the page

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a JavaScript expression on the page or a specific element. Returns the result as JSON.

target.description: CSS selector for the context element

function.description: JavaScript code to evaluate. Use (element) => { ... } when target is provided to receive the element as argument.

filename.description: Filename to save the result to

tools.name: browser_resize
tools.description: Resize the browser viewport to the specified dimensions

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the current page or the entire browser. Use this to clean up after tests.

tools.name: browser_tabs
tools.description: Manage browser tabs: list all open tabs, create a new tab, close a tab, or switch to a tab by index

index.description: Tab index, used for close/select. If omitted for close, current tab is closed.

url.description: URL to navigate to in a new tab

prompts.name: e2e_test_agent
prompts.description: Persona and general guidelines for E2E test execution using Playwright browser tools

prompts.name: e2e_test
prompts.description: Execute an E2E test plan using the Playwright browser automation tools
